title: 4/7/19 Google Earthing Mountains + Quotes on Diogenes

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-Log. It's the 7th of April, 2019, Sunday at 5.14 p.m.
I did a video early today, but I forgot to turn off my earphones, and so I had to scrap it because you couldn't hear what I was saying.
Because I passed out yesterday and forgot to turn the earphones off.
I bought weed yesterday because I forgot I was supposed to quit.
My mom got super pissed at me, and then I was like, oh, shit.
But it's because she was really happy that I was going to quit.
So, yeah, I think I will quit after this.
It was just that yesterday I was hanging out.
I got up at, like, noon, and I was working for a couple hours, and then I just kind of was like, oh, wouldn't that be cool to get stoned?
Okay, well, once a month you go over to the dispensary and blow 46 bucks, and you get all this edibles.
There's no need to smoke at all, by the way, anymore.
A weed is so cheap now.
Even just edibles, it's doable.
Not for me.
Well, actually, I think I could spend 45 a month, but that doesn't keep me stoned all month.
That would keep me stoned.
Last time I tried it, it seemed like a week, 45 bucks for a week.
So we'll see.
Hopefully, I'll find out when I run out, and I'll know exactly, because my tolerance goes down, you know?
If I get high off of edibles, and then I take two weeks off, you know, the tolerance goes down.
So since I did edibles last, I did smoke one joint.
My roommate came in and gave me a joint, and I decided I'd smoke it just because I hadn't smoked a joint since the edibles.
And that was a bad idea.
Well, I mean, I don't regret it.
It was a good idea because I just wanted to try it.
But it was bad, bad effects, and definitely never going to smoke anything ever again.
Gave me asthma really bad.
So what I'm going to do is, yeah, just do these edibles.
But yeah, I'm super pissed off my mom.
She doesn't want to talk to me until I'm done with them.
So yesterday, I was working on tracing these mountains.
I'm tracing, you know, tour of the mountain panorama, the trip to and back, so that you can make an elevation profile.
But I kind of, this new project that I'm doing, because I'm doing two projects at the same time,
Which is attaching quotes to the sides of my Diogenes book.
That's my new, all of my books, I want to do that.
I'm going to add quotes and also Google Earth images of where they're from and where they went and stuff.
But the problem is that it's time consuming.
It might take a while, but I'm just focused purely on this.
So I'm about halfway through, as it looks on the scroll bar, working on Strato.
And I was yawning a lot when I got up, too.
I yawn uncontrollably when I get up and also when I go to sleep.
So the end of the day vlogs don't make a difference.
I just yawn.
If I talk, I yawn.
Um, I don't, um, I kind of yawn throughout the day, too, but not as much as when I'm talking.
Um, so, uh, yeah, I'm not really high right now.
What happened was yesterday, I, I got, uh, I get $40, $45 off.
If you get $75, you get, like, $45 off over at the dispensary.
I go to Green Tree Medicinals on 55th and Arapaho, and, uh, once a month.
You can do that once a month.
But I had to, in order to get $75, I had to get another bag of popcorn, and I ate most of the bag of popcorn yesterday and almost finished it.
And, um, yeah, it got me way too high, and I just crashed.
I just fell asleep at, like, I don't even know what time.
Maybe 11 or something, and I didn't get up until, like, 1 in the morning or afternoon.
So I slept, like, 12 hours.
So, yeah, that's another reason to quit weed.
It makes you sleep too much.
But, um, so I kind of, that's why when I got up and I did the video, I didn't even realize my earphones were still on.
So that's why I have to do the video twice.
Um, so, uh, yeah, it's easy to overdo it.
Because I didn't eat anything yesterday.
So that popcorn was the first time I ate something, and so I was dealing it like food, you know.
I kicked my ass.
Um, so, but this project of the, uh, adding the quotes is fascinating.
I'm learning, uh, more than I ever did before.
Um, I've listened to the book a bunch of times, but, you know, I'm always working on something else and not completely giving my attention to it.
And, uh, oh, yeah, plus I'm high all the time.
But, um, so this time when I, when I actually look at the quotes, copy them, paste them onto an image,
Memorizing it, and, um, yeah, like more than I ever have.
So, uh, after, um, I'm about, after I do this, I want to put all of the images on the book and see what it looks like with all the images.
Uh, one reason that I'm doing it is I want, it'll help me give it an idea of how long the book is.
Um, my books are kind of like scrolls, and so I want to know how long in terms of feet or meters it is.
If you were to lay it all out in the same size it is when you're looking at the computer.
And, uh, have, have like, um, you know, when I top half how many pages it is, also have how, how many meters it is in terms of length.
And that'll give you, and when you have, uh, the quotes and the images, because I'm also going to have images of where they went and stuff, Google Earth.
When I have the images on the side of the quotes and the Google Earth going down, you can also kind of measure the size of the book.
Not just the chapters, but the images to remember where something was said or something was based on what, where the image on the side.
And also you can read the book just on the images, because a lot of the quotes that they have are good to, to know.
You know, you don't have to study Greek philosophy just by reading all of the guides.
You can just look at their quotes.
So, yeah, I'm super excited to see what it'll look like when they're, when it's all there on the side.
Um, and I'm about halfway through now and I want to work on it a few days.
So I'm not really working on the Google Earth quite as much because I'm totally hooked on this.
Um, and I just listen to it over and over again.
I listen to other stuff while I'm listening to it.
Um, and other books.
Um, so, uh, um, yeah.
And also somebody gave me the idea.

They were giving another website, but I think on, uh, Pinterest, not just Flickr, but on Pinterest make different, you know, uh, different albums for the different books and stuff of just the images of their quotes.
Um, so, uh, yeah, it's making me feel like I live back in ancient Rome.
I'm getting a feel for ancient Rome.
It's super civilized.
Those guys lived a long time.
Um, the life back then is similar to the life today.
You know, you stay busy, whether it's athletics or your job or your, uh, your writing.
Um, you know, nothing to back then was hindered people unless you were a slave.
You know, it's pretty much the same life.
Um, sometimes I think people may look in the past like it was just boredom twiddling your thumbs, but they had what they needed.
You know, they had their scrolls and their pens and their, and their ideas and, and their, uh, places where they would talk to other people.
Um, so, um, anyways, um, Ooh, I've been talking long enough.
So, uh, yeah, I don't even really have a goal for tomorrow.
It'll be the same thing cause I've been working on this for a long time, but, uh, um, yeah.
I'm motivated to see what it'll look like when it's the end, hopefully within a week and then
I'll, uh, yeah, I'll, I'll definitely mention it when I'm done.
All right.
Later.
